activated_rules.rule_name: Koncernstruktur – allow consignor name in any invoice text block

consignor.certificate_value:
mFiber AB
Drottninggatan 21
SE-411 14, Gothenburg
Sweden
consignor.invoice_value:
mfiber AB
Drottninggatan 21
SE-411 14 Gothenburg
Sweden
consignor.motivation: Consignor name 'mFiber AB' from certificate matches text in invoice including address and country after normalization. The difference in capitalization and the legal form abbreviation are allowed. The consignor name appears explicitly in the invoice header and address block (rule 4.1.0, 4.1.3.6). Country 'Sweden' matches exactly after normalization.

consignee.certificate_value:
CENTURY GATE CO. LTD
P.O. BOX 14368
RIYADH 7097
Saudi Arabia
consignee.invoice_value:
CENTURY GATE CO. LTD
P.O. BOX 14368
RIYADH 7097, SAUDI ARABIA
consignee.motivation: Consignee 'CENTURY GATE CO. LTD' matches invoice 'Bill to' field exactly including postal address and country 'Saudi Arabia'. Legal form abbreviation allowed (rule 4.1.3.6). Clear identification in invoice's primary bill-to field (rule 4.2.0.2).

goods_description.motivation: Certificate contains a general goods description combined with an explicit reference to invoice CGC0039-2 and invoice date. Invoice lists 434 reels of 'Tissue Paper (Napkin & Facial)' matching the certificate goods description and quantity. This satisfies the general goods description with invoice reference rule (4.3.5).

quantity.motivation: Certificate quantity of 88,452 kg Gross Weight / Net Weight matches invoice quantity of 88.452 MT when converted (1 MT = 1000 KG). Both indicate the same numeric value with allowed unit conversion and correct weight category, following rules 4.4.3.2 and 4.4.5.3.

origin.motivation: Certificate country of origin is 'India' which explicitly appears in invoice in 'Country of origin' field. The field matches exactly and complies with EU-normalization rules. No additional conflicting origin countries found.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All critical control points (consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity, origin) match correctly with explicit evidence in the invoice. No deviations or uncertainties identified that would warrant manual review or rejection.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter (avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprungsland) stämmer överens mellan certifikat och faktura. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
